business_purpose: Reconcile settled refund exposure and isolate unresolved leakage candidates for the GOLD production-account close.

scope.eligible_refunded_order_definition: A distinct in-scope order with at least one effective settled logical refund.

money_policy.fx_basis: Use the daily fx_rates.usd_per_unit rate for each refund or reversal service_date and row currency.
money_policy.order_gross_comparison: Value the associated order gross in its order currency at the settled refund service_date rate used for the candidate comparison.

candidate_if_any: The order's effective settled refund value after reversals is greater than its gross order value in USD.
The order has at least two unreversed effective settled logical refunds with the same normalized reason code.

cohort_risk_policy.LOW: Leakage candidates are below 2% of eligible refunded orders and net refunds are below USD 20000.
cohort_risk_policy.MODERATE: The LOW conditions are not both met, leakage candidates are below 5% of eligible refunded orders, and net refunds are below USD 50000.
